title: Forget SpaceX: The Next Red-Hot IPO Is Here and It’s a Quantum Computing Stock
description: The IPO market is waking up again, and few offerings have generated as much buzz as SpaceX. Between Elon Musk’s star power, the company’s reported multi-trillion-dollar valuation it is seeking, and dreams of Mars colonization, it is easy to see why investors are excited. But history says investors chasing blockbuster IPOs right out of the ... Forget SpaceX: The Next Red-Hot IPO Is Here and It’s a Quantum Computing Stock

title: Quantinuum IPO Targets $12.7B Valuation: Honeywell Spinoff Reports $31M in 2025 Revenue
description: Quantinuum IPO targets a $12.7 billion valuation as Honeywell’s quantum computing spinoff sets a $45–$50 share price range, seeking $1.05 billion — despite reporting a $192.6 million net loss against $30.9 million in 2025 revenue, with a QNT Nasdaq listing expected in mid-June.
